pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh line 28), verifier.py (line 57), export_result.sh (line 28). Verified against Ekylibre database schema which uses ISO 8601 date format for started_on field.
Task setup script (setup_task.sh line 28), verifier.py (line 63), export_result.sh (line 29). Verified against Ekylibre database schema which uses ISO 8601 date format for stopped_on field.

Verifier.py (line 71) checks for currency == 'EUR'. Verified as correct for France in 2017 via web search showing EUR has been the official French currency since 2002. GAEC JOULIN is a real French farm in Charente-Maritime.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a financial year for calendar year 2017 (January 1 to December 31) with currency EUR for the GAEC JOULIN farm (a real French farm in Charente-Maritime, France). The dataset is real farm data sourced from the Ekylibre first_run-demo repository. All metadata values (2017-01-01, 2017-12-31, EUR) are verified as correct and consistent with Ekylibre's database schema and French accounting standards.
